name: Firehouse
content: I saw Food House play at the Firehouse on their Two House tour, along with Domesticatrix and Zombae. I’m not sure how we all fit into that venue. Food House had to stop their set halfway through their set to ask us if we were ok, because apparently we were partying hard enough that the band was concerned for our safety. In reality, the audience was just every queer person in a hundred mile radius finally having a spot to party. Amazing community.
